Hardware Component File

WB56_X91_M4R_66_PSP_v1.2

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference WB56_X91_M4R_66_PSP_v1.2.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 7E0
Receive ID 7E8
Functional Addr 7A
Functional Name Injection

Sent Bytes 2121
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
Bit indicating that the immobiliser diagnosis is availableImmobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to ECMImmobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM secure modeImmobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to BCM authorizationImmobiliser diagnosis bit indicating that the engine isn't running due to a CAN network problem with BCMConnection status with ECU N°8 (AC)Connection status with ECU N°7 (ACC)Connection status with ECU N°6Connection status with ECU N°5Connection status with ECU N°4 (BCM)Connection status with ECU N°3 (IP)Connection status with ECU N°2 (ABS)Connection status with ECU N°1 (Only for LPG ECU)Connection status with ECU N°16Connection status with ECU N°15Connection status with ECU N°14 (SWA)Connection status with ECU N°13Connection status with ECU N°12Connection status with ECU N°11Connection status with ECU N°10Connection status with ECU N°9 (AGB)diag. byte stored upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash framediag. byte upon reception of a coherent AIRBAG_Crash frameConnection status with ECU N°24Connection status with ECU N°23Connection status with ECU N°22Connection status with ECU N°21Connection status with ECU N°20 (USM)Connection status with ECU N°19Connection status with ECU N°18Connection status with ECU N°17Carrier ftdivst1Carrier ftdivst2Carrier ftdivst3High speed engine fan delayed commandLow speed engine fan delayed commandfan 2 activation request from agbfan 1 activation request from agbfan 2 activation request from acfan 1 activation request from acfan 1 activation request from water temperature or engine managementfan 2 activation request from water temperature or engine managementAir conditionning pressure detection. Stored in E2PROMAir conditionning pressure sensor short circuit memorised failureAir conditionning pressure sensor open circuit memorised failureAir conditionning pressure sensor short circuit detected failureAir conditionning pressure sensor open circuit detected failureDiesel Pre heating done PRECHASKDiesel Pre heating lamp commande PRECHOUTSpecific request dmdspecStatus of starter STATUDEMFirst start detected yet FIRSTDEMStarter fault DEFDEMECM cranking authorization TOPECMEngine status ETAMOTMXEngine speedWater Temperature
Frame 22 - CC/SL frame I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 2122
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
Gear engaged default identificationAccel pedal depressed beyond mechanical hard pointEngine control request for speed limiter system deactivationEngine control request for speed limiter abnormal deactivationEngine control request for cruise control system deactivationEngine control request for cruise control abnormal deactivationBraking detected for cruise controlSudden braking detected for cruise controlState of the steering wheel buttons : not filteredInput of the cruise control main switchInput of the speed limiter main switchACC frame presence detection with security on configuration detectionDetect the cruise control switch connection. Stored in E2PROMDetect cruise control option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROMDetect the speed limiter switch connection. Stored in E2PROMSteering wheel switches connection detection. Stored in E2PROMSpeed limiter option with security on configuration detection. Stored in E2PROMDetect the speed distance limiter option. Stored in E2PROMBoolean for wired brake connectionBegin stroke clutch switch connection detection. Stored in E2PROMWired open active brake switch inputState of the begin stroke clutch pedal. Physical input.Displayed vehicle speedCompilation of all the cru/sl normal deactivations due to system causes. Saved in E2PROMCompilation of all the cru/sl normal causes of deactivationTransmission ratio for manual gearbox calculated by the engine control unitCCSL Steering Wheel Command Switched blocked button detected failureDetected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch invalid valueDetected failure : Cruise Control Steering Wheel Command Switch open circuitDetected failure : Cruise Control Main Switch CoherenceThe vehicle speed used for CC/SL is in mphDisplayed vehicle speed received on the CAN network not availableIn manual gearbox the reverse position is engagedVehicle speed received on the CAN network not availableAutomatic or manual parking braking detectedGearbox is on the neutral position (information from CAN)The automatic gearbox transmits a limphome or invalid or unexpected gear valueThe automatic gearbox is on reverse positionThe automatic gearbox is on neutral positionThe automatic gearbox is not coupled to the engineThe clutch pedal status information is unavailableState of the clutch pedalThe brake status information is absentBraking detected with the brake switchesCounter : increment at each START button pushRequested SpeedCarrier of all the failures which cause CC failureCarrier of all the failures which cause CC/SL failureMaximum duration of RESUME button pressMaximum duration of SET+ button pressMaximum duration of SET- button pressMaximum duration of SUSPEND button pressMaximum value of counter for detection of blocked button. Saved in E2PROMInput of the cruise control and speed limiter steering wheel push buttonsCarrier for safety failure diagnosisESP vehicle speed

ECUDocs

The industry standard for automotive hardware ECU documentation. Providing precise wiring diagrams and pinout specifications for technicians and enthusiasts worldwide.

London, United Kingdom
